title: ASX Dividend & Franking Credit Tracker — Excel Template for Australian Investors & SMSFs
hero_headline: Stop leaving money on the table.
hero_subtext: Australian dividend investors can collect up to 43% more yield than the cash dividend alone — when you account for franking credits. Most investors have no idea how much they're actually earning, or how much the ATO should be refunding their SMSF. This Excel template fixes that.
bullets: Track every ASX holding — enter up to 30+ stocks, auto-calculate dividend income, grossed-up yield, and ex-dividend dates in one place
See your exact SMSF franking credit refund — the full FY2025/26 dividend register calculates how much the ATO owes your fund at 15% or 0% tax rate
5-year income forecast with DRP modelling — project dividend growth, model reinvestment, and find out how much portfolio you need for $50K or $100K/yr
color_theme: navy and gold — Australian financial trust palette; navy (#0D1F4C) primary, gold (#F0A500) accent, white background, dark grey body text
target_customer: Self-directed ASX investors, SMSF trustees, and retirees building passive income from Australian shares — anyone tired of paying a subscription just to track dividends
